declared_goal: Client ke feedback survey ke natije ko analyze karke sudhar ke liye mauke dhoondna.
declared_plan: Aavashyak libraries ko import karna aur feedback data load karna
Text data ko clean aur prepare karna
Mukhya samasyaon ko pehchanna aur categorize karna
Natije ko plots aur charts ke sath dikhana

trajectory.thought: Sabse pehle, mujhe aavashyak libraries import karni hain aur feedback data load karna hai.
trajectory.observation: Libraries successfully import ho gayi hain. Feedback data load ho raha hai...

trajectory.thought: Ab, main text data ko clean aur prepare karunga.
trajectory.observation: Text data clean aur prepare ho gaya hai. Unwanted characters remove ho gaye hain.

trajectory.thought: Next, I'll perform sentiment analysis on the cleaned feedback.
trajectory.observation: Sentiment analysis complete ho gaya hai. Results dikhate hain 70% positive, 15% negative, aur 15% neutral.

trajectory.thought: Ab, main natije ko plots aur charts ke sath visualize karunga.
trajectory.observation: Plots aur charts generate ho gaye hain. Visualizations sentiment distribution dikhate hain.

trajectory.thought: Visualization complete hai. Ab main observations aur sujhav present kar sakta hoon.
trajectory.observation: Observations aur sujhav present ho gaye hain. Stakeholders ko inform kar diya gaya hai.

trajectory.thought: Presentation complete ho gaya hai. Main poore process ko review karunga taaki sab kuch sahi hai.
trajectory.observation: Final review complete ho gaya hai. Sabhi steps sahi se follow hue hain.

ground_truth.rationale: Agent ne declared plan ko sahi tarike se follow kiya hai: libraries import karna, data clean karna, sentiment analysis karna, natije visualize karna, aur observations present karna. Koi deviation nahi hai. Plan match signal confirm karta hai ki agent ne specified sequence ko pura kiya.
